summary: Trump's Wednesday address signaling the U.S. would hit Iran "extremely hard" over the next two to three weeks, with no clear path to reopening the Strait of Hormuz, sent oil prices higher and stocks lower. Meanwhile, the March jobs report landed this morning on Good Friday while every stock exchange sits dark, meaning markets cannot price in the data until Monday.
tweet: Trump's Iran escalation rattled stocks overnight and March payrolls hit this morning on a closed market — whatever the number, the reaction waits until Monday.
